messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I can't log into my account

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I'm sorry you're having trouble. Let me help you resolve this.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Have you tried resetting your password?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, but I'm not receiving the reset email

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Let me check your account settings.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I've resent the password reset email to your registered address.
